data.summary_suggestion: Create a new access control list for service
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Access Control List (ACL) for the specified service version. ACLs define IP-based access rules for content delivery. Requires the service ID and version number. Accepts ACL configuration in the request body including name and IP entries. Returns the created ACL object with assigned ID. This operation modifies the service configuration and requires a new version deployment to take effect.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, or effects. Added context about ACL functionality, required parameters (service_id, version), expected request/response formats, and important side effect that configuration changes require deployment.

message: Operation 'getStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is too vague ('Get stats' could apply to any stats endpoint). Description lacks specificity about what statistics are returned, what parameters control the query, and how to interpret results. Added domain context about CDN metrics, clarified parameter usage, specified return data types, and explained use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve CDN performance and traffic statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time and historical statistics for CDN performance and traffic metrics. Supports filtering by time range, service, and metric type through query parameters. Returns aggregated statistics including requests, bandwidth, cache hit rates, and error rates. Data granularity and retention depend on the requested time period. Useful for monitoring service performance and analyzing traffic patterns.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague ('Get stats' could apply to any stats endpoint). Description lacks specificity about what statistics are returned, what parameters control the query, and how to interpret results. Added domain context about CDN metrics, clarified parameter usage, specified return data types, and explained use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all versions of a service. Returns a list of service version objects containing version numbers, creation timestamps, and deployment status. Versions are ordered chronologically with the most recent first. Use this to view the version history and identify which versions are active or available for activation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added context about what is returned, ordering, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to interpret results.

message: Operation 'createServiceVersion' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added critical context about cloning behavior, initial state, return value, and the purpose of versioning to help AI agents understand the operation's role in the service configuration workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new version of a service by cloning the most recent version. The new version is created in an editable state and is not automatically activated. Returns the newly created service version object with an incremented version number. This operation enables configuration changes without affecting the currently active version.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added critical context about cloning behavior, initial state, return value, and the purpose of versioning to help AI agents understand the operation's role in the service configuration workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific service version. data.description_suggestion: Updates configuration settings for a service version. Accepts a request body with version properties to modify (e.g., comment, settings). The version must be in an editable state (not active). Returns the updated service version object. Changes do not affect the currently active version until explicitly activated.

message: Operation 'activateServiceVersion' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Activates a service version, making it the currently deployed configuration. The activated version becomes live and serves all traffic for the service. Only one version can be active at a time; activating a new version deactivates the previous one. Returns the activated service version object with updated status. This is a critical operation that affects production traffic.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added critical context about the effects of activation, the one-active-at-a-time constraint, and the production impact to help AI agents understand the significance and consequences of this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Purge a specific URL from CDN cache
data.description_suggestion: Removes a specific URL from the CDN cache across all edge locations. Requires the URL as a path parameter (URL-encoded). Returns a purge request confirmation with a purge ID for tracking. The URL must be fully qualified (include protocol and domain).
